etimesGot ‘LPG charges’ on your restaurant bill? Here’s what you can do right nowRestaurants can no longer add 'LPG charges' or similar fuel surcharges to your bill by default. The Central Consumer Protection Authority (CCPA) has advised that these costs should be included in menu prices. Customers cannot be forced to pay extra unless it's voluntary. You can dispute such charges and report violations to consumer helplines.

etimesMeet Chesney: Kangaroo in denim diaper on the run, zoo says ‘he is not mean or dangerous’A kangaroo named Chesney escaped from Sunshine Farm petting zoo in Wisconsin, prompting a search operation involving local authorities. The animal has been spotted multiple times in nearby areas, with officials urging the public not to approach or chase it. The zoo expressed concern for Chesney's well-being, noting he is likely cold and scared.
